candidate_definitions.text: This is a series of GPU optimization topics. Here we will introduce  how to optimize the CUDA kernel in detail.  I will introduce several basic kernel optimizations, including: elementwise, reduce, sgemv, sgemm, etc. The performance of these kernels is basically at or near the theoretical limit.

This is a series of GPU optimization topics. Here we will introduce how to optimize the program on the GPU in detail. Here, I will introduce several basic kernel optimizations, including: elementwise, reduce, sgemv, sgemm, etc. All the following performance data are run on V100 …
